Ntc Of Joinder In Joelle Jakobsen M.D.'S Mtn To Change Venue To Sacramento County Superior Court
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER LAING's Joinder In Joelle Jakobsen M.D.'S Motion To Change Venue To Sacramento County Superior Court. The Court transfers venue to Sacramento pursuant to the parties' stipulation. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
